flashcards.definition: A point where f'(x) = 0 or f'(x) is undefined; candidates for extrema.
If f' changes from + to − at c, local max. From − to +, local min.
If f'(c)=0 and f''(c)>0, local min. If f''(c)<0, local max.
1) Model the problem. 2) Find f'. 3) Set f'=0. 4) Check endpoints if closed interval.
On [a,b]: evaluate f at critical points and endpoints, compare values.
